name: Momentum
description: Continuation model that waits for the base trend, a fresh opposing spike, and no repeated spike in the same direction.

trigger: Long when the base trend is already up, price prints a fresh downside spike, and there has not been another downside spike recently.
Short when the base trend is already down, price prints a fresh upside spike, and there has not been another upside spike recently.

earlyExit: Long exit when the uptrend is still intact and price has already made the upside spike that ends the move.
Short exit when the downtrend is still intact and price has already made the downside spike that ends the move.

checks.label: Price just printed a downside spike
There has not been another downside spike recently
Price just printed an upside spike
There has not been another upside spike recently
Price has already made the upside spike that ends the move
Price has already made the downside spike that ends the move
